case_title: BAYVIEW PROPERTY MANAGERS VS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BAYVIEW PROPERTY MANAGERS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $357.09 FILED BY BAYVIEW PROPERTY MANAGERS AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-14-2000 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
